message:
feat(conformance): add golden file validation, requirement ID tracking, and tool diagnostic snapshots

Golden file infrastructure:
- New content_golden and details_golden fields in Expected struct for
  externalizing large expected values to files under tests/conformance/goldens/
- validate_expected_with_goldens() function with path-safety validation
  (rejects .. escape attempts)
- conformance_golden_root() points to tests/conformance/goldens/

Requirement ID tracking:
- New requirement_ids field on TestCase with display_name() method that
  prefixes test names with [REQ-ID] for traceability

CLI fixture expansion:
- cli_flags.json "defaults" case now uses details_golden pointing to
  cli_flags/defaults.json instead of inline details_exact
- New policy_and_surface_control_flags test case covering
  --session-durability, --no-migrations, --acp, --extension-policy,
  --repair-policy, --theme-path, --hide-cwd-in-prompt, --list-providers
- cli_details() expanded with session_durability, no_migrations, acp,
  extension_policy, repair_policy, theme_path, and more

Tool diagnostic snapshot testing:
- normalize_tool_diagnostic_for_snapshot() and normalize_tool_diagnostic_value()
  scrub workspace paths, timestamps, permissions, and env for deterministic
  insta snapshots
- e2e_read_diagnostic_artifact_matches_golden_contract test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,21 +5,11 @@
   "cases": [
     {
       "name": "defaults",
+      "description": "Default CLI parse shape stays stable as new flags are added",
+      "requirement_ids": ["CLI-FLAGS-DEFAULTS", "CLI-FLAGS-FULL-SHAPE"],
       "input": { "args": [] },
       "expected": {
-        "details_exact": {
-          "version": false,
-          "print": false,
-          "no_session": false,
-          "no_tools": false,
-          "tools": "read,bash,edit,write,grep,find,ls,hashline_edit",
-          "no_extensions": false,
-          "no_skills": false,
-          "no_prompt_templates": false,
-          "no_themes": false,
-          "command": null,
-          "list_models": null
-        }
+        "details_golden": "cli_flags/defaults.json"
       }
     },
     {
@@ -139,6 +129,43 @@
         }
       }
     },
+    {
+      "name": "policy_and_surface_control_flags",
+      "description": "Newer policy and surface flags remain covered by conformance fixtures",
+      "requirement_ids": ["CLI-FLAGS-POLICY-AND-SURFACE"],
+      "input": {
+        "args": [
+          "--session-durability",
+          "strict",
+          "--no-migrations",
+          "--acp",
+          "--extension-policy",
+          "balanced",
+          "--explain-extension-policy",
+          "--repair-policy",
+          "auto-safe",
+          "--explain-repair-policy",
+          "--theme-path",
+          "themes/custom",
+          "--hide-cwd-in-prompt",
+          "--list-providers"
+        ]
+      },
+      "expected": {
+        "details_exact": {
+          "session_durability": "strict",
+          "no_migrations": true,
+          "acp": true,
+          "extension_policy": "balanced",
+          "explain_extension_policy": true,
+          "repair_policy": "auto-safe",
+          "explain_repair_policy": true,
+          "theme_path": ["themes/custom"],
+          "hide_cwd_in_prompt": true,
+          "list_providers": true
+        }
+      }
+    },
     {
       "name": "export_flag",
       "input": { "args": ["--export", "/tmp/out.html"] },
